host.note: Measured locally from the repository checkout with uv-managed Python environments.

inputs: The deployment failed because the database URL was missing.
Please summarize the release notes before the meeting.
task.quality_method: Manual sanity check for adequacy, Korean fluency, and exact short-term handling.

candidate_families_seen_2026.reason: 2026 multilingual MT family with quantized, GGUF, ONNX, and MLX exports. Tested MLX 4-bit representative.
2026 Tencent MT2 family. Tested both MLX 4-bit and GGUF IQ4_XS representatives; skipped 7B as same family and heavier.
GitHub project created 2026-01-03 with 1.2B Korean-English GGUF artifacts. Tested Q4_K_M representative.
2026 local CPU export family. Tested CTranslate2 int8 representative.
2026 English-to-Korean CTranslate2/SentencePiece model with 185M parameters. Tested direct CTranslate2 path.
2026 Google translation model family. Tested MLX 4-bit representative; heavier and worse short-term handling than Hy-MT2.
2026 ko/en on-device LoRA family. Gemma tested and rejected; Kanana failed to load with current Transformers validation.
2026 ONNX/MLX export family. Tested MLX int4 with mlx-lm; failed because this port needs a custom MADLAD runtime rather than generic mlx-lm.
Small bilingual models and 2026 repackaged/fine-tuned variants. Tested multiple en-ko CT2/ONNX representatives; outputs were unusable except QuickMT, tracked separately.
2026 GitHub project for ACGN translation. Not tested for CCTrans default because it is domain-specific, not a light general English-to-Korean local model.

candidate_families_seen_2026.family: Large/older GGUF translation models updated in 2026
candidate_families_seen_2026.reason: Seen in HF search, but created before 2026 or much heavier (3B/8B/20B) and not lighter than tested Hy-MT2/LFM2 representatives; KO-EN-only variants do not match default English-to-Korean target.

candidate_families_seen_2026.family: GitHub notebooks/evaluation repos without app-ready weights
candidate_families_seen_2026.reason: Found in 2026 GitHub search. They are training/evaluation notebooks or analysis repos, not downloadable light local model artifacts for CCTrans.

results.load_error: StrictDataclassClassValidationError: hidden size 1792 is not a multiple of attention heads 24
results.verdict: Retry succeeded with pinned dependency matrix and raw Instruction/Input/Response prompt. Not default-worthy: CC-BY-NC adapter, fragile runtime pins, and over-translation on isolated short word.

translations.input: The deployment failed because the database URL was missing.
Please summarize the release notes before the meeting.
twice

results.verdict: Reject. 2026 packaged CT2 int8 variant reproduces the same unusable OPUS output as other OPUS exports.

results.load_error: MLX error: Failed to load the default metallib. library not found
results.verdict: Generic mlx-lm was the wrong runtime. Official soniqo/speech-swift CLI built, but failed at MLX Swift metallib load on this host; keep deferred.

current_recommendation.reason: Best quality/speed balance after warm-cache retest: load 0.75s, peak RSS about 1.5 GB, and all sample translations correct.
alternatives: gyung/lfm2-1.2b-koen-mt-v8-rl-10k-merged-GGUF Q4_K_M is also strong but needs license review.
unsloth/Hy-MT2-1.8B-GGUF IQ4_XS is a good llama.cpp route but slower than MLX on sentence samples.
quickmt/quickmt-en-ko is fastest/lightest but failed the isolated short-word test.
current_recommendation.caveat: Search is grouped by distinct model/runtime families to avoid duplicate variants. New 2026 uploads can appear after this run and should be re-queried before a release decision.
